empty.title: No branches yet
empty.description: You haven't created any branches yet. Create the first one to start managing your business.

noBusiness.title: No business assigned
noBusiness.description: You don't have a business assigned. Contact the administrator to get access.

notFound.title: Branch not found
notFound.description: The branch you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have permission to view it.

limitReached.title: Branch limit reached
limitReached.description: Your plan allows up to {max} branch(es) and you already have {current}. Upgrade your plan to create more.

tips.title: Tips
tips.codeDescription: Use a unique and descriptive code, like HQ-001 for Headquarters.
tips.mainBranchDescription: The main branch is assigned to orders by default.
tips.whatsappDescription: Enter the number in E.164 format, e.g. +13001234567.

create.title: Create Branch
create.subtitle: Fill in the details to register a new branch

delete.title: Delete Branch
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this branch? This action cannot be undone.

DEDICATED.title: Dedicated Number
DEDICATED.description: Each branch has its own exclusive WhatsApp number.

SINGLE_NUMBER.title: Single Number
SINGLE_NUMBER.description: One WhatsApp number handles all branches of the business.

errors.limitReached: You have reached the branch limit for your plan
errors.duplicateCode: A branch with this code already exists

plan.limitDescription: Your current plan allows {max} branch(es). Upgrade your plan to create more.

limits.title: Plan branches
limits.limitReachedMessage: You've reached your plan's branch limit. Upgrade to create more.
limits.upgradeDescription: Your current plan only allows one branch. Upgrade to manage multiple locations.

form.title: Branch details
form.description: Fill in the basic information for the new branch
form.editDescription: Modify the information for this branch

descriptions.basic: Branch name, unique code and URL-friendly slug

help.slug: URL identifier for the branch. Auto-generated from the name.
help.codeLocked: The main branch code cannot be modified.
help.phoneNumberId: Phone number ID from Meta Business Manager
help.isActive: Inactive branches do not receive new orders.
help.mainBranchAlwaysActive: The main branch cannot be deactivated.

errors.slugInvalid: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens
errors.phoneInvalid: Invalid number. Use E.164 format, e.g. +13001234567
